tasks.label: Roblox: Do all tasks
tasks.detail: Legacy robloxstudio-mcp bridge task: asks for a game brief, writes .game-brief.txt, streams .playtest-live.json during playtests, and runs the older HTTP-bridge dev loop until Ctrl+C or DONE sentinel.

tasks.label: Roblox: Do all tasks (reuse last brief)
tasks.detail: Legacy robloxstudio-mcp bridge task: runs the same older HTTP-bridge dev loop, but reuses the last saved .game-brief.txt without prompting again.

tasks.label: Roblox: Verify MCP bridge
tasks.detail: Legacy robloxstudio-mcp bridge task: checks the older HTTP bridge, plugin connection, and callable MCP endpoints on port 58741.

tasks.label: Roblox: Reset MCP bridge
tasks.detail: Legacy robloxstudio-mcp bridge task: restarts the older local HTTP bridge flow and reinstalls the external Studio plugin manifest if needed.

tasks.label: Roblox: Start 1vsCOM playtest
tasks.detail: Legacy robloxstudio-mcp bridge task: sets ArenaDuelAutoQueueMode=Bot and starts a single-player Studio playtest through the older HTTP bridge.

tasks.label: Roblox: Clear 1vsCOM autoqueue
tasks.detail: Legacy robloxstudio-mcp bridge task: clears ArenaDuelAutoQueueMode so subsequent Studio playtests stay manual.

inputs.description: Beschreibe das Zielspiel, die Arena, Combat-Ziele und was der Loop verbessern soll.
inputs.default: WoW Arena Clone mit Vorbereitungsraum, Countdown, Toren, sauberem Combat-Feedback, Fehlerbehebung und logischen Verbesserungen waehrend der Iterationen
